info.title: MyApp API
info.description: API for Tree Disease Detection System

ModelFile.description: .onnx file - required, only .onnx extension is accepted.

post.summary: Dự đoán bệnh trên lá lúa từ hình ảnh được tải lên. Trả về treatment - thuốc(medicine)
AI/heuristic treatment plan from catalog context (optional OpenAI).

get.summary: Trees linked from the user's past scans (picker for assign-to-tree).

post.summary: Create a tree record to attach scans to.

patch.summary: Assign a prediction (scan) to a tree; sets prediction.TreeId and may add illness–tree relationship.

role.description: One of MyApp.Domain.Enums.UserRole names (e.g. Technician, Staff).

score.description:
Thang ?i?m ?ánh giá t? 1 ??n 5
1 = R?t không chính xác, 2 = Không chính xác, 3 = Trung bình, 4 = Chính xác, 5 = R?t chính xác

Bearer.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example: "Bearer {token}"
Bearer.name: Authorization
